类 AbstractNodeCostSearch

java.lang.Object
com.zenith.feature.pathfinder.calc.AbstractNodeCostSearch
直接已知子类:
AStarPathFinder
public abstract class AbstractNodeCostSearch extends Object

    protected final PathNode[]

    protected static final double[]
    COEFFICIENTS
    This is really complicated and hard to explain.
    protected final Goal
    goal
     
    protected static final double
    MIN_DIST_PATH
    If a path goes less than 5 blocks and doesn't make it to its goal, it's not worth considering.
    protected static final double
    MIN_IMPROVEMENT
    there are floating point errors caused by random combinations of traverse and diagonal over a flat area that means that sometimes there's a cost improvement of like 10 ^ -16 it's not worth the time to update the costs, decrease-key the heap, potentially repropagate, etc
    protected PathNode
    mostRecentConsidered

    realStart

    • COEFFICIENTS

      protected static final double[] COEFFICIENTS
      This is really complicated and hard to explain. I wrote a comment in the old version of MineBot but it was so long it was easier as a Google Doc (because I could insert charts).
      另请参阅:
      • here

    • MIN_DIST_PATH

      protected static final double MIN_DIST_PATH
      If a path goes less than 5 blocks and doesn't make it to its goal, it's not worth considering.
      另请参阅:
      • 常量字段值

    • MIN_IMPROVEMENT

      protected static final double MIN_IMPROVEMENT
      there are floating point errors caused by random combinations of traverse and diagonal over a flat area that means that sometimes there's a cost improvement of like 10 ^ -16 it's not worth the time to update the costs, decrease-key the heap, potentially repropagate, etc

      who cares about a hundredth of a tick? that's half a millisecond for crying out loud!

      另请参阅:
      • 常量字段值

  • 方法详细资料

    • cancel

      public void cancel()

    • calculate

      public PathCalculationResult calculate(long primaryTimeout, long failureTimeout)

    • calculate0

      protected abstract Optional<IPath> calculate0(long primaryTimeout, long failureTimeout)

    • getDistFromStartSq

      protected double getDistFromStartSq(PathNode n)
      Determines the distance squared from the specified node to the start node. Intended for use in distance comparison, rather than anything that considers the real distance value, hence the "sq".
      参数:
      n - A node
      返回:
      The distance, squared

    • getNodeAtPosition

      protected PathNode getNodeAtPosition(int x, int y, int z, long hashCode)
      Attempts to search the block position hashCode long to PathNode map for the node mapped to the specified pos. If no node is found, a new node is created.
      参数:
      x - The x position of the node
      y - The y position of the node
      z - The z position of the node
      hashCode - The hash code of the node, provided by BlockPos.longHash(int, int, int)
      返回:
      The associated node
      另请参阅:
      • Issue #107
